body.query: mutation { createSolutionInstance(input: { solutionId: "solution-uuid-here", instanceName: "Salesforce to Slack Integration", authValues: [{ externalId: "salesforce-auth", authId: "auth-uuid-sf" }], configValues: [{ externalId: "slack-channel", value: "#notifications" }] }) { solutionInstance { id name enabled workflows { edges { node { id triggerUrl } } } } } }
